CONTENT.Club career: Having come through the youth ranks at Nantes, Mendy made his professional debut for the club on 13 September 2020, in a 2–1 loss to Monaco.On 27 July 2021, Mendy joined Ligue 1 side Angers for an undisclosed fee, signing a three-year contract.On 8 September 2023, Mendy joined Turkish side Trabzonspor for an estimated €5 million fee.
CONTENT.External links: Batista Mendy at the French Football Federation (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Mendy is of Bissau-Guinean descent. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Batista Adélino Mendy (born 12 January 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Süper Lig club Trabzonspor.
